summary: End-to-end testing of ViceHub pre-launch landing page. Backend: 7/7 pytest cases pass (root health, waitlist count, new email insert + count growth, duplicate email idempotency, invalid email 422, missing email 422, companion SSE streams delta+done). Frontend: All 12 requested flows verified on production preview URL — hero copy, ticking countdown, hero CTA opens waitlist dialog, dialog submit shows success, final waitlist form submit shows success, product preview card opens concept dialog, AI Companion streams a sensible concept-style answer (no fake GTA 6 facts), FAQ accordion expands, mobile hamburger opens mobile menu, nav links smooth-scroll, zero console errors, no horizontal scroll (scrollWidth == clientWidth == 1920).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event hooks; migrating to lifespan handlers is recommended for forward compatibility (non-blocking).

POST /api/waitlist returns success:true even when Resend confirmation fails — confirmation_sent flag is exposed, which matches the stated 'Resend best-effort' requirement and the testing-mode note. No change needed.

All required data-testid attributes are present and stable (hero-join-waitlist-btn, waitlist-dialog, dialog-waitlist-*, final-waitlist-*, product-card-ai-companion, product-preview-dialog, ai-chat-input/send/messages, faq-trigger-0, mobile-menu-toggle, mobile-menu). Good testability.
Suggested-question chips use data-testid='suggested-question-<slug>' (not 'ai-chip-*'); this is fine, just a naming heads-up for future tests.
AI Companion system prompt correctly enforces 'concept preview, no real GTA 6 facts' and streamed answer confirmed this behaviour at runtime.
test_credentials: None required (public landing page, no auth).
seed_data_creation: Two random TEST_ waitlist rows inserted via UI flows (dialog + final form) using uuid-based emails; pytest also inserts several uuid-based rows. These persist in Supabase (no delete endpoint exposed). Email prefix pattern: test_<hex>@example.com.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_vicehub_backend.py is the canonical regression test (run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v). SSE chat test reads stream until 'done' event. Frontend tests should scroll directly to the AI chip with scrollIntoView({block:'center'}) BEFORE clicking suggested-question-* — the section has Reveal animations that can place the chip off-viewport intermittently. Use unique uuid emails per signup to avoid 'already_joined' branch unless explicitly testing it. Resend is in testing mode so confirmation_sent will be false for any address other than sajidtezpur5@gmail.com — this is expected, not a bug.
